rules.rationale: Margin level proxies pricing power and business model quality.

bull.text: Revenue compounded at a CAGR of 39.0% over the restated period, with revenue from operations of ₹1,374 cr.
Revenue increased in 2 of 2 year-over-year steps.
Cash flow from operations (CFO) was positive in all 3 reported years: ₹929 cr (FY25), ₹743 cr (FY24), and ₹532 cr (FY23).

bear.text: Findings comprised 1 critical, 3 high, 4 medium, and 1 low severity issue.
Debt/Equity ratio of 3.70, reflecting total borrowings of ₹398 cr against net worth of ₹108 cr.
Current ratio of 0.21, indicating current liabilities nearly cover or exceed current assets.
